steps.title: Identify the exponential form
steps.content: For each increase of $1$ in $x$, $y$ is multiplied by $4$. That means the relationship has the form $$y=a(4)^x.$$

steps.title: Choose the matching equation
steps.content: The matching choice, $y=150(4)^x$, has initial value $150$ and multiplies by $4$ each time $x$ increases by $1$.
